issues: Indentation errors in compute_signal method causing logic to be unreachable or incorrect.
In compute_signal, the exit condition check and entry condition check are not mutually exclusive due to indentation, potentially causing incorrect signal returns.
No handling of adapter kwargs (feed_urls, days_back) as per adapter contract, though not strictly required to fail.
Position days held calculation uses .days on datetime subtraction which is correct, but position entry_date type is not validated; assuming correct.
Allocation logic correctly uses 5% per signal and max exposure is not explicitly enforced but can be assumed handled elsewhere; no explicit max exposure enforcement in code.
